product_overview: CodeNap is a public-facing agency website that helps visitors learn about services, company background, training offerings, and job opportunities, while also providing a contact form for inquiries. It includes an internal admin panel for managing dynamic site content such as services, jobs, FAQs, testimonials, and contact details.
core_goals: Learn about CodeNap’s company, team, and capabilities
Browse services and open detailed service pages
Submit inquiries through the contact form
Review careers information and available job opportunities
Access the admin panel to manage site content and service ordering

features.name: Home Page
features.description: Presents CodeNap’s main agency landing page with introductory content, service highlights, testimonials, and calls to action.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Review the agency introduction and featured content -> Explore highlighted services and testimonials -> Follow a call to action to continue browsing the site

features.name: About Page
features.description: Shows company background, values, and engineering leadership information.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read the company overview and team information -> Learn about CodeNap’s history and values

features.name: Services Directory
features.description: Lists the agency’s service offerings in visually rich cards so visitors can compare capabilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> Browse the available service cards -> Select a service to view more detail

features.name: Service Detail Pages
features.description: Provides a deeper view of an individual service, including descriptions, tags, tech stack, process steps, and performance stats.
user_flows: Navigate to /services -> Select a service to open its detail page -> Review the service description, tech stack, process timeline, and metrics

features.name: Training Page
features.description: Displays CodeNap’s training program overview and details for visitors interested in developer training.
user_flows: Navigate to /training -> Review the training program overview -> Read the details of the available training offering

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Lets visitors submit inquiries to CodeNap for client services or training-related questions.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Enter inquiry details -> Submit the contact form -> See confirmation that the request was sent

features.name: Careers Board and Applications
features.description: Shows open roles with job details and supports application submission for interested candidates.
user_flows: Navigate to /careers -> Review open roles, departments, salary ranges, and location types -> Open a job to see requirements -> Submit an application for a role

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Allows internal users to authenticate and access the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See access to the admin dashboard on success

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Shows summary counts for key content areas managed in the CMS.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Sign in with valid admin credentials -> Arrive at /admin -> Review summary cards for services, testimonials, FAQs, jobs, and applications

features.name: Service Management
features.description: Lets admins create, edit, and delete service offerings from the CMS.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/services -> Add a new service by entering its details -> Save the service -> See the new service appear in the list
Navigate to /admin/services -> Select an existing service for editing -> Update the service details -> Save the changes -> See the updated service in the list
Navigate to /admin/services -> Select a service for deletion -> Confirm the deletion -> See the service removed from the list

features.name: Service Reordering
features.description: Allows admins to reorder services through drag-and-drop and persist the sequence automatically.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/services -> Grab a service row and drag it to a new position -> Drop it in place -> See the list reorder and the new order persist

features.name: FAQ Management
features.description: Allows admins to manage frequently asked questions content in the CMS.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/faqs -> Add a new FAQ entry -> Save the FAQ -> See the new entry in the list
Navigate to /admin/faqs -> Edit an existing FAQ entry -> Save the changes -> See the updated FAQ in the list
Navigate to /admin/faqs -> Delete an FAQ entry -> Confirm the deletion -> See the FAQ removed from the list

features.name: Testimonial Management
features.description: Allows admins to manage customer testimonials displayed on the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/testimonials -> Add a new testimonial -> Save the testimonial -> See the new testimonial in the list
Navigate to /admin/testimonials -> Edit an existing testimonial -> Save the changes -> See the updated testimonial in the list
Navigate to /admin/testimonials -> Delete a testimonial -> Confirm the deletion -> See the testimonial removed from the list

features.name: Job Management
features.description: Allows admins to create, edit, and delete job listings shown on the careers page.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/jobs -> Add a new job listing -> Save the listing -> See the new job appear in the list
Navigate to /admin/jobs -> Edit an existing job listing -> Save the changes -> See the updated job in the list
Navigate to /admin/jobs -> Delete a job listing -> Confirm the deletion -> See the job removed from the list

features.name: Application Review
features.description: Lets admins view submitted job applications in a dedicated admin list.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/applications -> Review the list of candidate submissions -> Open an application to inspect its details

features.name: Contact Information Management
features.description: Allows admins to update the contact details and social links displayed across the site.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/contact-info -> Update the address, phone number, email, or social links -> Save the changes -> See the updated contact information reflected in the editor

routes.description: Landing and home page presenting the main agency site
List of services offered by CodeNap
Detailed description of a specific service
Admin panel services manager with drag-and-drop reordering

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Authenticates admin users using stored credentials and retrieves a JWT token.
user_interactions: See redirection to Admin Dashboard on success or error message on failure

features.name: Service Reordering (Drag and Drop)
features.description: Allows administrators to drag and drop service rows to reorder them in real-time.
user_interactions: Grab grip handle (GripVertical icon) of a service row
Drag row up or down and drop it over another row
Save reordered sequence automatically on drag end

features.name: Service Management (CRUD)
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete service offerings.
user_interactions: Click "Add Service" to open create form
Fill in basic details, icon, features, steps, stats, and click "Save Service"
Click Edit (pencil icon) on a service to edit and click "Save Service" to submit changes
Click Delete (trash icon) and click OK to confirm deletion
